ops.body: Done in dcfaa47 (PR #2, v0.31.0): engine parameterized by ModelPin (CodePin byte-identical to the old consts — TestEncodeParity + fused-search goldens unchanged; refuter verified byte-identity vs HEAD); weights cache namespaced models/<repo>/<revision> (one-time ~30 MB code-model re-download, changelogged). internal/web runs a resident native engine on potion-base-8M (pin string unchanged → cached page vectors survive); uv driver deleted (embed_driver.py, UVEmbedder, CI HF-snapshot steps); new golden_base8m.json parity fixture + generator, WASM-vs-Python parity observed ≤ 3e-8; BM25-only degrade now keyed on ErrWeightsUnavailable; downloads bounded at 5 min (review finding). Web kept its own potion-base-8M per the resolved design fork — the code model was not adopted for web.
